느헤미야 11:1.content: The princes of the people lived in Jerusalem. The rest of the people also cast lots, to bring one of ten to dwell in Jerusalem the holy city, and nine parts in the other cities.

느헤미야 11:2.content: The people blessed all the men who willingly offered themselves to dwell in Jerusalem.

느헤미야 11:3.content: Now these are the chiefs of the province who lived in Jerusalem; but in the cities of Judah everyone lived in his possession in their cities: Israel, the priests, the Levites, the temple servants, and the children of Solomon’s servants.

느헤미야 11:4.content: Some of the children of Judah and of the children of Benjamin lived in Jerusalem. Of the children of Judah: Athaiah the son of Uzziah, the son of Zechariah, the son of Amariah, the son of Shephatiah, the son of Mahalalel, of the children of Perez;

느헤미야 11:5.content: and Maaseiah the son of Baruch, the son of Colhozeh, the son of Hazaiah, the son of Adaiah, the son of Joiarib, the son of Zechariah, the son of the Shilonite.

느헤미야 11:6.content: All the sons of Perez who lived in Jerusalem were four hundred sixty-eight valiant men.

느헤미야 11:7.content: These are the sons of Benjamin: Sallu the son of Meshullam, the son of Joed, the son of Pedaiah, the son of Kolaiah, the son of Maaseiah, the son of Ithiel, the son of Jeshaiah.

느헤미야 11:8.content: After him Gabbai, Sallai, nine hundred twenty-eight.

느헤미야 11:9.content: Joel the son of Zichri was their overseer; and Judah the son of Hassenuah was second over the city.

느헤미야 11:10.content: Of the priests: Jedaiah the son of Joiarib, Jachin,

느헤미야 11:11.content: Seraiah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of God’s house,

느헤미야 11:12.content: and their brothers who did the work of the house, eight hundred twenty-two; and Adaiah the son of Jeroham, the son of Pelaliah, the son of Amzi, the son of Zechariah, the son of Pashhur, the son of Malchijah,

느헤미야 11:13.content: and his brothers, chiefs of fathers’ households, two hundred forty-two; and Amashsai the son of Azarel, the son of Ahzai, the son of Meshillemoth, the son of Immer,

느헤미야 11:14.content: and their brothers, mighty men of valor, one hundred twenty-eight; and their overseer was Zabdiel, the son of Haggedolim.

느헤미야 11:15.content: Of the Levites: Shemaiah the son of Hasshub, the son of Azrikam, the son of Hashabiah, the son of Bunni;

느헤미야 11:16.content: and Shabbethai and Jozabad, of the chiefs of the Levites, who had the oversight of the outward business of God’s house;

느헤미야 11:17.content: and Mattaniah the son of Mica, the son of Zabdi, the son of Asaph, who was the chief to begin the thanksgiving in prayer, and Bakbukiah, the second among his brothers; and Abda the son of Shammua, the son of Galal, the son of Jeduthun.

느헤미야 11:18.content: All the Levites in the holy city were two hundred eighty-four.

느헤미야 11:19.content: Moreover the gatekeepers, Akkub, Talmon, and their brothers, who kept watch at the gates, were one hundred seventy-two.

느헤미야 11:20.content: The residue of Israel, of the priests, the Levites, were in all the cities of Judah, everyone in his inheritance.

느헤미야 11:21.content: But the temple servants lived in Ophel: and Ziha and Gishpa were over the temple servants.

느헤미야 11:22.content: The overseer also of the Levites at Jerusalem was Uzzi the son of Bani, the son of Hashabiah, the son of Mattaniah, the son of Mica, of the sons of Asaph, the singers, over the business of God’s house.

느헤미야 11:23.content: For there was a commandment from the king concerning them, and a settled provision for the singers, as every day required.

느헤미야 11:24.content: Pethahiah the son of Meshezabel, of the children of Zerah the son of Judah, was at the king’s hand in all matters concerning the people.

느헤미야 11:25.content: As for the villages, with their fields, some of the children of Judah lived in Kiriath Arba and its towns, in Dibon and its towns, in Jekabzeel and its villages,

느헤미야 11:26.content: in Jeshua, in Moladah, Beth Pelet,

느헤미야 11:27.content: in Hazar Shual, in Beersheba and its towns,

느헤미야 11:28.content: in Ziklag, in Meconah and in its towns,

느헤미야 11:29.content: in En Rimmon, in Zorah, in Jarmuth,

느헤미야 11:30.content: Zanoah, Adullam, and their villages, Lachish and its fields, and Azekah and its towns. So they encamped from Beersheba to the valley of Hinnom.

느헤미야 11:31.content: The children of Benjamin also lived from Geba onward, at Michmash and Aija, and at Bethel and its towns,

느헤미야 11:35.content: Lod, and Ono, the valley of craftsmen.

느헤미야 11:36.content: Of the Levites, certain divisions in Judah settled in Benjamin’s territory.
